import { operate } from '../util/lift'; import { mergeAll } from './mergeAll'; import { popNumber, popScheduler } from '../util/args'; import { from } from '../observable/from'; export function merge(...args) { const scheduler = popScheduler(args); const concurrent = popNumber(args, Infinity); return operate((source, subscriber) => { mergeAll(concurrent)(from([source, ...args], scheduler)).subscribe(subscriber); }); } //# sourceMappingURL=merge.js.map
